title: Hostile Archetype (S20 Landed Combat)
description: A data-driven humanoid combatant class (spec §22). Loaded straight from content/combat/*.ron into reachlock_core::combat::HostileArchetype — no wrapper envelope. All timing is integer ticks at the 10 Hz combat rate; all damage/range/speed is fixed-point i64 (1024 = 1.0). Keeping every number here means balancing is a content edit, never a recompile.

id.description: Unique archetype id; spawns reference it by this string

chase_radius.description: Target inside this radius (world units) wakes Idle/Patrol into Chase

disengage_radius.description: Target beyond this radius (world units) ends the fight

flee_hp_frac.description: Hull fraction (0..=1024) below which the humanoid flees; 0 = fearless

startup_ticks.description: Telegraph ticks before the swing can connect

active_ticks.description: Ticks during which the arc can land a hit

recovery_ticks.description: Punishable recovery ticks after the active window

damage.description: Hit points removed on a clean connect (fixed-point i64)

cooldown_ticks.description: Ticks before the guard can be raised again

parry_ticks.description: Front window during which a hit is negated entirely

recovery_ticks.description: Committed recovery ticks after the roll

distance.description: Roll distance in world units (fixed-point i64)
